title: Work item user preference display settings

hiddenMetadataKeys.description: Array of metadata keys that should be hidden in the work item display

collapsedGroups.description: Array of group identifiers (for example status IDs) that should be rendered collapsed

visibleGroups.description: Array of group identifiers (for example status IDs) that should be visible on the board. null or absent means all groups are visible

viewMode.description: Which view mode (list or board) the saved view should open in
